ring_nccl.desc: NCCL ring algorithm for ReduceScatter: a simple peer‑to‑peer pipeline ring.

collnetdirect_nccl.desc: NCCL CollNetDirect algorithm for ReduceScatter (2.14+): direct CollNet peer communications.

nvls_nccl.desc: NCCL NVLS algorithm for ReduceScatter (2.17+): NVLink SHARP‑offload enabled flat‑tree.

nvlstree_nccl.desc: NCCL NVLSTree algorithm for ReduceScatter (2.18+): NVLink SHARP‑offload enabled recursive‑doubling tree.

pat_nccl.desc: NCCL PAT algorithm for ReduceScatter (2.23+): PCI‑Atomic Tree algorithm optimized for PCIe topologies.
